summary: Audience recording praised as the best available version, with clear and enjoyable sound.
review: The sole reviewer rates this tape four stars, calling it the "best Aud source" and noting that it sounds the best among existing audience recordings. No comments are made about the musical performance or specific songs, so the assessment focuses on the recording’s perceived quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it praises the audio source but provides no detail on the show, limiting confidence in a comprehensive rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer states this version sounds best among audience recordings, implying clear and well‑balanced sound despite lack of technical specifics.
